# Concept Scorecard

Three concepts compete. One is selected. Both the selection and the rejections are recorded.

See `.claude/skills/award-website-os/references/02-concept-art-direction-master.md` for the concept formula and scoring rubric.

## Concept formula

> This website presents [business] as [visual metaphor / world] so that [audience] feels [emotion] and understands [core value].

## Hand-off to art-director and ux-copy-strategist

The selected concept becomes the immutable spine for `art-direction.md`, `copy-system.md`, and `signature-interaction-spec.md`. Changes to the concept after this point require a re-scoring round.
